escalation.rationale: US-Iran direct military exchange with Revolutionary Guards targeting US airbase after Trump rejected peace terms and US struck Iranian drone facilities.

ticker_items: Iran's Revolutionary Guard targets US airbase after Trump rejects peace plan
US strikes Iranian drone facility near Strait of Hormuz on day 90
Ukraine uses Storm Shadow missiles against Russian Sevastopol
North Korea tests AI-guided cruise missiles with autonomous navigation
Xi Jinping reportedly planning first 2026 overseas trip to Pyongyang

eastern_europe.description: Ukraine attacked the port city of Sevastopol using Storm Shadow missiles according to Russian-occupied Crimea authorities.
Russian drone strikes targeted several Ukrainian regions according to Ukrainian officials.

middle_east.description: US Central Command forces shot down four Iranian attack drones and struck a ground control station about to launch a fifth drone.
Iran's Revolutionary Guard targeted a US airbase in response to US strikes, with location not specified.

observers.description: President Xi Jinping reportedly planning first overseas trip of 2026 to North Korea as Beijing seeks to reinforce influence amid deepening North Korea-Russia ties. China-aligned APT groups documented targeting AI robotics in South Korea and conducting espionage in Venezuela and Gulf region.

Tested AI-guided tactical cruise missiles with autonomous navigation systems and multiple weapons systems including nuclear-capable cruise missiles. Constitutional changes stripped reunification language, signaling shift in strategy toward South Korea relations.

financial.notes: US draining Strategic Petroleum Reserve to contain energy prices amid Iran conflict creating concerns about earlier energy supply cliff.

update_log.text: Iran's Revolutionary Guard reports targeting US airbase after US strikes Iranian drone facility near Strait of Hormuz
US Central Command shoots down four Iranian attack drones and strikes ground control station in Bandar Abbas
Ukraine uses Storm Shadow missiles against Russian-occupied Sevastopol according to Crimea authorities
Trump rejects Iranian peace terms as US-Iran conflict enters day 90
